outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low near-term volatility due to positive total GEX (0.59B). Negative monthly GEX (-0.11B) signals potential volatility expansion medium-term. Flat skew confirms balanced 0DTE, but bearish smirk in weekly/monthly indicates hedging pressure.
outlook.summary: Price pinned at 24221.75, just above 0DTE Max Pain (24200). Positive GEX suppresses volatility with dealers long gamma. Massive monthly put wall at 24000 (1549 OI) provides institutional floor. Weekly call wall at 24400 caps upside. Expect range-bound behavior with magnetic pull toward 24200. Bearish skew in longer expiries suggests protective positioning.
